title: The View shouldn't alter.
poc:
create view myview 
     as select * from A;
alter table myview alter column a set null;
key_bug_features: Altering view columns directly causes unexpected behavior.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE A (a VARCHAR(10), b INT NOT NULL, c DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
CREATE VIEW myview AS SELECT a, b FROM A WHERE b > 1;
ALTER TABLE myview ALTER COLUMN a SET NULL;
